lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you do to help a bold adventurer like myself?

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: I can tell you about holy symbols or the Skillcape of Prayer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about holy symbols.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: If you have a silver star, which is the holy symbol of Saradomin, then I can bless it. Then if you are wearing it, it will help you when you are praying.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Skillcape of Prayer.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: The Skillcape of Prayer is the hardest of all the skillcapes to get; it requires much devotion to acquire but also imbues the wearer with the ability to briefly fly!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: The Cape of Prayer also increases the amount of Prayer points restored from drinking potions when it is equipped. Is there something else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you do to help a bold adventurer like myself?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Well I can bless that star of Saradomin you have, or I could tell you about the Skillcape of Prayer!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Skillcape of Prayer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Well, seeing as you are so devout in praising the gods, I could sell you a Skillcape of Prayer, which increases the amount of Prayer points restored when drinking potions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please. So few people have Skillcapes of Prayer!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: One as pious as you has certainly earned the right to wear one, but the monastery requires a donation of 99000 coins for the privilege.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I can't afford one of those.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: I am sorry to hear that. If you should find yourself in wealthier times come back and see me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am always happy to contribute towards the monastery's upkeep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Praise be to Saradomin!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Yes! Praise he who brings life to this world.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm here to help with Oziach!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: That is great, thank you! Speak to me downstairs in my office though, I don't have the paperwork up here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Brother Jered!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: I hear Oziach has been scared, thank you! And thank your friend too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Iffie? She helped a lot, I need to go and give her the reward I promised.

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: You better go and do that then, thanks again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Brother Jered!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Hello [player name]! Thank you for saving the monastery, we will be forever thankful!

lines.speaker: Brother Jered
lines.text: Iffie had something she wanted to give you, you should talk to her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will do that right away!
